steps.title: Spot the key signal
steps.content: The phrase “an important exception:” marks the passage structure — it indicates that what follows will contradict the overemphasized interpretation introduced in the first sentence.

steps.title: Match the structure
steps.content:
C directly identifies this structure: it describes how an interpretation has been perpetuated in a field and then provides a counterexample showing the interpretation isn't always accurate.

The others mischaracterize the structure:
  • A treats the examples as main research subjects
  • B overstates the consensus aspect and adds unsupported controversy
  • D reverses the relationship between ideas
.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
